build.beforeBuildCommand: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r src dist/
build.beforeDevCommand: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r src dist/

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
